tom.label: The Plateau-Stuck Club Racer
tom.demographics: Age 33-46, Cat 3-4 racer, training 8-12hrs/week, professional with family
tom.core_emotion: Quiet shame that effort isn't yielding results
meta_description_angles: Why your FTP won't budge — and the fix the pros use.
The training structure that changed everything.
content_hooks: If your power numbers haven't moved in months
You're training hard but the results stopped matching the effort
What separates Cat 4 from Cat 2 isn't talent — it's structure

mark.label: The Bucket-List Gran Fondo Achiever
mark.demographics: Age 42-58, senior professional/business owner, specific target event
meta_description_angles: Your target event is closer than you think.
The preparation the finishers never skip.
content_hooks: You've entered the event, now you need the plan
Most riders show up hoping to survive — you can show up ready to perform
The window isn't closing. You just need the right approach.

james.label: The Comeback Athlete Reclaiming Lost Form
james.demographics: Previously athletic, returning after a break, struggling with fitness and weight
james.core_emotion: Longing for a former version of himself
meta_description_angles: Your best days aren't behind you.
Not Done Yet. Here's how to prove it.
The comeback doesn't start with the bike — it starts with the plan.
content_hooks: You remember what it felt like to be fit
The science says you can be faster at 45 than you were at 35
Not Done Yet isn't just a slogan — it's a system

dave.label: The Podcast Loyalist Who Hasn't Pulled the Trigger
dave.demographics: Already consuming free content heavily, hesitant about committing
dave.core_emotion: Comfortable inertia masking fear of commitment
meta_description_angles: You've been listening. Now it's time to act.
The difference between knowing and doing.
Everything you've heard — now in a system that works.
content_hooks: You've listened to 200 episodes. What changed?
Knowledge without action is just entertainment
The riders who pull the trigger are the ones who get faster
